about.label: Contributions
about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.p1: I'm Anderson Kaiti, a Computer Science graduate building well-structured, scalable web and mobile applications with React, React Native, Next.js, Laravel, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS. I care deeply about code quality, clarity, and long-term maintainability.
about.p2: My approach goes beyond making things work — I focus on understanding why they work and how they can evolve safely. From component design to data flow and external integrations, I consistently apply best practices to deliver solutions that are performant, readable, and easy to extend.

experiences.label: Journey
experiences.title: Professional Experience
experiences.subtitle: My career journey and impactful work experiences

solidTech.title: Full Stack Developer
solidTech.description:
- **Full Stack & Mobile:** Built scalable ecosystems integrating high-performance interfaces (React/Next.js) with backend systems (Node.js/Prisma).
- **Smart TV:** Implemented digital signage and medical testing systems for Smart TVs using React Native TVOS with real-time WebSocket communication.
- **Gamification & Social:** Developed training engines with haptic feedback, social feeds, rankings, and achievement systems.
- **B2B & Financial:** Built admin dashboards with visual training builders and integrated financial modules for Pix checkout and subscription management.
- **Logistics:** Developed features for logistics systems covering customer, delivery personnel, and control panel apps.

funprev.title: IT Internship
funprev.description:
- **IT Infrastructure Troubleshooting:** Diagnosed and resolved issues in networks, devices, and IT infrastructure, ensuring system stability, security, and continuity.
- **Web Development:** Developed, maintained, and implemented features in internal web systems using PHP and JavaScript.
- **Data Management:** Managed data integrity and executed SQL queries, focusing on PostgreSQL and phpMyAdmin to support reporting and system updates.
- **Hardware & Software Setup:** Installed and configured software and hardware, ensuring proper operation of the technological environment.
- **Backup Management:** Performed periodic backups to ensure data integrity and availability.
- **Technical Support:** Provided user support with logical troubleshooting to minimize downtime and operational impact.
- **Network Administration:** Configured, monitored, and maintained network devices such as routers and switches.
- **Process Optimization:** Improved processes and proposed practical solutions aligned with the organization's technological needs.
